title: andrographis elongata
intro: Andrographis elongata, also known as King of Bitters, is a plant species of the genus Andrographis, native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Andrographis elongata include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of cold and flu, and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Andrographis elongata is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine systems.
